title: City of Miami Beach Meetings and Agendas
text: Official City of Miami Beach Meetings and Agendas page. It provides access to upcoming and past meetings, including agendas, minutes, and video recordings. Use this as the first source for official agenda packets, minutes, after-action reports, and meeting metadata.

title: Miami Beach TV live meeting source
text: Miami Beach TV says City Commission, board, and committee meetings are aired on MBTV and live-streamed on YouTube at the City of Miami Beach YouTube channel. It also notes recently ended live broadcasts may take time to appear in the indexed archive.

title: Miami Beach archived meetings
text: Official archived meetings page for City of Miami Beach MBTV. Commission meeting videos range from April 30, 2014 to present. Use this for historical video lookup and post-meeting indexing.

title: Democracy.cc Miami Beach agenda index
text: Democracy.cc indexes Miami Beach City Commission meetings, resolutions, ordinances, public hearings, agenda items, and videos. It can be useful for fast discovery, but official city records remain the authority.

title: Agenda item reference patterns
text: Miami Beach meeting discussions often reference agenda item codes such as R5A, R7B, C2A, C4E, C7A, NB1, PA1, or PH1. When such a code appears in speech, search the current agenda first, then prior meetings and related memoranda.

title: Official record reference patterns
text: When a speaker references a resolution, ordinance, LTC, memo, exhibit, attachment, procurement item, RFP, RFQ, bid, contract, budget amendment, or after-action item, the assistant should retrieve the document title, sponsor or department, date, status, and any related vote history.
